hero.title: Australia 2026
hero.subtitle: Your collaborative photo album for the adventure of a lifetime
hero.description: Share memories, explore together, and relive every moment of your Australian journey with friends

photos.title: Share Photos
photos.description: Upload and organize your favorite moments from the trip. Create albums for different locations and experiences.

map.title: Interactive Map
map.description: See where each photo was taken on an interactive map. Explore your journey across Australia visually.

timeline.title: Timeline View
timeline.description: Relive your adventure chronologically. See how your journey unfolded day by day.

gettingStarted.title: Ready to Start?
gettingStarted.description: Sign in with Google to access the shared album and start uploading your photos

footer.title: Australia 2026 Shared Album
footer.description: A collaborative photo-sharing platform for friends traveling together
